en.name: Level 5 — Terror Hotel
en.shortDescription: An infinite 1930s hotel of pristine mahogany halls and mysterious rooms, populated by deathmoths and unsettling watching presences.
en.atmosphere: Eerie elegance: vintage décor, ambient jazz, self-cleaning surfaces, strange whispers and a constant sense of being watched.
en.tips: Stay with communities like the Homely Hotel. Avoid elevators past floor 12 and dark deathmoth rooms. Carry good meat for Samantha.
